title: min_tls_version
text: min_tls_version Specifies the minimum allowed TLS protocol version. min_tls_version | min_tls_v = {1.0 | 1.1 | 1.2 | 1.3} Use Use this setting to downgrade the minimum TLS protocol version. Even if you specify a lower protocol version, OpenSSL still attempts to connect to the highest protocol first. Description Uniface uses TLS version 1.2 as the default level, since older protocols are currently considered unsafe. You can override this setting when there is a need to connect to legacy systems that do not support TLS v1.2. Example: Downgrading TLS to version 1.0 The following assignment settings permit all supported TLS versions starting from v1.0, such as v1.0, v1.1, v1.2, and v1.3. Explain this code ;client.asn [NET_SETTINGS] CheckClient= min_tls_version=1.0 , client_certificate=clcert.crt, %\client_key=clkey.key, client_key_password=pas5Word Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
